---
name: Implementation task
about: A bounded, reviewable implementation task
title: "[Area] "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Context
Why does this work exist? Link the evidence, incident, parent issue or architecture record.

## Goal
One verifiable outcome in one sentence.

## Scope
- 

## Non-goals
- 

## Dependencies
- Blocked by:
- Blocks:
- Required human approval:

## Safety boundary
- [ ] Read-only
- [ ] Dry-run only
- [ ] Approval required
- [ ] Live boundary; explicit human approval mandatory

## Implementation notes
Describe the intended technical direction without prescribing every line of the implementation.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Functional behavior is proven
- [ ] Relevant unit, contract and regression tests pass
- [ ] No secrets are committed, logged or included in reports
- [ ] Documentation/ADR is updated if a public contract changes
- [ ] Evidence report, PR or artifact is linked

## Validation
List exact commands, test suites or manual checks.

## Stop conditions
State when the implementer must stop and report a blocker.

## Expected PR title
`type(area): concise change`
